mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, August 4, 1863
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from Germantown, [Virginia], discussing his duty to serve in the war, the lack of news, and troubles with the draft.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2030
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
